title: Join/Leave Messages
description: Adds client side join and leave messages
body:
adds client side join and leave messages to your game. 
## Config Screen
in the config accessed by pressing J(remappable) you can customize the specified things: 
- color 
- if prefix shows 
- kill switch
- not show messages if server already sent them
- turn on gamemode messages tells you when someone switches gamemodes (can make it so it only shows for spectator)

## Gamemode Tracker
- keeps track of player's gamemodes in a server
- can notify you what gamemode players are in upon joining a server & filter to a specific gamemode
- /gamemodecheck <player> command to see the current gamemode of a specified player.

**NOTICE**: The gamemode tracking relies on packets sent by the server and may not work on some servers. 

I've always disliked when servers do not show join/leave messages for certain people or ever. This mod prevents that and adds client side join and leave messages.
